title: npamp_00 CertVerify KAT
description: Schema for the N-PAMP draft-00 §6.1 CertificateVerify Known-Answer-Test vector (spec/10). A standards-anchored, NON-CIRCULAR KAT: it carries the RFC 8032 §7.1 Ed25519 anchor (pubkey + deterministic signature), fixed signing inputs (signing_input = 64*0x20 || context || 0x00 || transcript_hash), and the expected certverify_value (u16(0x0807) || Ed25519 signature) — fixed standards-derived inputs and expectations, not implementation output bytes.

spec.description: Spec clause(s) this KAT anchors; must reference the N-PAMP draft-00 handshake binding.

signature_scheme.description: N-PAMP signature-scheme code point carried as the u16 prefix of certverify_value.

provenance.description: Narrative attesting the KAT is standards-derived and non-circular (signatures produced by crypto/ed25519, not by the implementation under test).

contexts.description: Human-readable CertificateVerify context labels signed per role.

coverage.description: What this vector anchors and what it explicitly does NOT cover.

npamp_inputs.description: Fixed inputs the CertVerify signs: RFC 8032 test keypairs and the Transcript-KAT points (TH_sId server / TH_cId client) per spec §6.1.

th_cid.description: Client transcript hash TH_cId (SHA-256, 32 bytes) the client CertVerify signs.

th_sid.description: Server transcript hash TH_sId (SHA-256, 32 bytes) the server CertVerify signs.

expected.description: Expected standards-derived outputs: signing inputs, raw Ed25519 signatures (64 bytes), and full certverify_value (u16(0x0807) || signature = 66 bytes) per role.

signature_client.description: Raw Ed25519 signature over signing_input_client (64 bytes).

signature_server.description: Raw Ed25519 signature over signing_input_server (64 bytes).

signing_input_client.description: 64*0x20 || context || 0x00 || TH_cId (138 bytes for the draft-00 client context).

signing_input_server.description: 64*0x20 || context || 0x00 || TH_sId (138 bytes for the draft-00 server context).

rfc8032_ed25519.description: RFC 8032 §7.1 Ed25519 anchor block: published test vectors that anchor the Ed25519 primitive (pubkey derivation + deterministic signature).

source_url.description: Primary-source URL for the RFC 8032 §7.1 test vectors.

rfc8032Vector.description: One RFC 8032 §7.1 Ed25519 test vector (message may be empty, e.g. TEST 1).

message.description: Message bytes as hex; empty string for the zero-length-message vector.
